data.title: Process Manager for Autonomous AI Agents

data.summary: Large Chunk Test-Time Training (LaCT) has shown strong performance on long-context 3D reconstruction, but its fully plastic inference-time updates remain vulnerable to catastrophic forgetting and overfitting. data.title: Toward a Tractability Frontier for Exact Relevance Certification

data.title: Measurement of Generative AI Workload Power Profiles for Whole-Facility Data Center Infrastructure Planning
